mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE user_type = #{userType} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE region_id = #{regionId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT * FROM sys_user
(username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user
(username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
